criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence in its features and functionalities.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use, interface design, and user satisfaction with the app.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and quality of features offered by the app, such as music generation, editing tools, and collaboration options.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: The number of platforms (e.g., iOS, Android, Web) on which the app is available.

criteria.name: Popularity
criteria.description: The app's user base size and overall popularity in the market.
criteria.sources: Download statistics, user reviews, app ratings
